summary: The torch reference passes kernel_size, stride, and padding from get_init_inputs() into ModelNew.__init__. The custom model initially defined a no-arg constructor, so correctness failed before execution with a constructor arity mismatch. Fix by matching ModelNew.__init__ to the reference initialization contract and accepting the three init arguments, even if the custom op implementation uses fixed pooling parameters internally.
